item.title: PostgreSQL л°ұм—… ліөкө¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
item.description:
pg_dump

PostgreSQLм—җм„ң кё°ліё м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” logical backup л°©мӢқмңјлЎң mysqldump мҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ л°©лІ•
л°ұм—… мҲҳн–ү мӢңм җмқҳ мҠӨлғ…мғ·л§Ң к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳл©° мӢңм җліөкө¬лҠ” л¶Ҳк°Җн•Ё
pg_dumpлҠ” лӢЁмқј DB backup, pg_dumpallмқҖ м „мІҙ DB backupн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё

backup script

#!/bin/bash
DEL_FILE=$(date -d '2 day ago' +'%Y-%m-%d_')"*.dump"
FILENAME=$(date +"%Y-%m-%d_%H%M").dump
BACKUP_DIR=/home1/irteam/psql/backup/testdb
PG_USER="irteam"
PASSWORD=""

cd $BACKUP_DIR
echo "DB backup start time : " $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
pg_dumpall -h localhost -p 3000 -U $PG_USER -v -j 3 -f "${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME}" >& "${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME}".log?
echo "Successful db backup ( ${BACKUP_DIR}/DBNAME_${FILENAME} )"
echo "Delete old file DBNAME_${DEL_FILE}"
rm "${BACKUP_DIR}/DBNAME_${DEL_FILE}"
echo "BACKUP - End time : " $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  • -d, –dbname : Backupн•  Database лӘ…
  • -h, –host : Database мЈјмҶҢ
  • -U, –username : Database м ‘мҶҚ мӢң User ID
  • -f, –file : Backup File Name
  • -t, –table : нҠ№м • Tableл§Ң Backupн•ҳл Өн•  л•Ң лҢҖмғҒмқҙ лҗҳлҠ” Table лӘ…
  • -j, –jobs : Backup мӢң лі‘л ¬ мІҳлҰ¬
  • -v, –verbose : м§„н–ү кіјм • н‘ңмӢң

restore test

psql -p 3000 -d postgres -f 2020-04-10_1431.dump
  • pg_dump лҘј нҶөн•ң л°ұм—…мқҖ pg_restoreлҘј нҶөн•ҙ ліөкө¬н•Ё

pg_start_backup

PostgreSQL м—җм„ң м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” hot backup кё°лҠҘ, л°ұм—… ліё + WAL лЎңк·ё нҢҢмқј replay лЎң мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” мӢңм җ ліөкө¬ к°ҖлҠҘ

hot_backup.sh

#!/bin/bash

### [set ENV.] ###########################################################
export PG_PORT=3000
export PG_DATA=/home1/irteam/psql/engn/PGSQL
export PG_ARCH=/home1/irteam/psql/arch/testdb
export PG_USER=irteam
export PG_DB=testdb

export BACKUP_DIR=/home1/irteam/psql/backup/testdb
##########################################################################

# Default ENV
export LANG=C
export CURRENT_DATE=`date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"`
export BULIST=${BACKUP_DIR}/LOG/.HOT-${PG_DB}-BULIST.dat
export TMPFILE=${BACKUP_DIR}/LOG/HOT-${PG_DB}.log
export LOGFILE=${BACKUP_DIR}/LOG/HOT-${PG_DB}-${CURRENT_DATE}.log

# SQL LIST
BACKUP_START="SELECT pg_start_backup('full_backup');"
BACKUP_STOP="SELECT pg_stop_backup();"

echo "########## [Step 1] `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` BEGIN BACKUP ##########" >> ${TMPFILE}

psql -p ${PG_PORT} -d ${PG_DB} -U ${PG_USER} -c "${BACKUP_START}" >> ${TMPFILE}  2>&1

if [ $? -eq "0" ]
then
  echo ">>>>> `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` Begin backup completed" >> ${TMPFILE}
else
  echo ">>>>> `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` Begin backup failed" >> ${TMPFILE}
  exit 1
fi

echo " " >> ${TMPFILE}
echo "########## [Step 2] `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` DATA COPY ##########" >> ${TMPFILE}

export TMP=${BACKUP_DIR}/LOG/.HOT-${PG_DB}.tmp

psql -p ${PG_PORT} -d ${PG_DB} -U ${PG_USER} <<! > ${TMP}
select distinct 'value', case when length(pg_tablespace_location(oid))=0 then (select setting from pg_settings where name='data_directory')
else pg_tablespace_location(oid) end
from pg_tablespace
where spcname not in ('ts_temp'); \q
!

/bin/cat ${TMP} | /bin/awk '$1 == "value" { print $3 }' > ${BULIST}

echo ${PG_ARCH} >> ${BULIST}
IFS=$'\n' read -d '' -r -a lines < ${BULIST}


echo ">>>>> Backup List" >> ${TMPFILE}
cat ${BULIST} >> ${TMPFILE}
echo " " >> ${TMPFILE}

echo ${lines[*]}
#CHKPOINT=$(find /home1/irteam/psql/arch/testdb -type f -mtime +1 -name '*backup' -printf '%f\n' | sort -r | head -1)
tar -cv  --exclude="${PG_DATA}/pg_wal/*" \-f $BACKUP_DIR/backup.tar ${lines[*]}

echo ">>>>> `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` data copy completed" >> ${TMPFILE}

echo " " >> ${TMPFILE}
echo "########## [Step 3] `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` END BACKUP ##########" >> ${TMPFILE}
psql -p ${PG_PORT} -d ${PG_DB} -U ${PG_USER} -c "${BACKUP_STOP}" >> ${TMPFILE}  2>&1

if [ $? -eq "0" ]
then
  echo ">>>>> `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"`  Backup completed" >> ${TMPFILE}
  echo " " >> ${TMPFILE}
#  psql -p ${PG_PORT} -d ${PG_DB} -U ${PG_USER} -c "select pg_switch_xlog();" >> ${TMPFILE}  2>&1
#  psql -p ${PG_PORT} -d ${PG_DB} -U ${PG_USER} -c "select pg_switch_xlog();" >> ${TMPFILE}  2>&1
  echo ">>>>> `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` HOT Backup completed successfully!!!" >> ${TMPFILE}
  mv ${TMPFILE} ${LOGFILE}
else
  echo ">>>>> `date "+%Y-%m-%d-%H:%M:%S"` HOT Backup failed!!!" >> ${TMPFILE}
  exit 1
fi

rm -rf ${BACKUP_DIR}/LOG/.*
find ${BACKUP_DIR}/LOG -name "HOT-*.log" -mtime +2 -exec rm {} \;

restore test

  • лҚ°мқҙн„° мӮӯм ң м „
postgres=# select now(), count(*) from tb_test;
             now              | count
------------------------------+--------
 2020-04-13 00:08:07.88325+09 | 100000
(1 row)
  • backup мҲҳн–ү
### hotbackup.sh мҲҳн–ү

### backup info нҷ•мқё 
[irteam@testserver1 00:21:24 ~/psql/arch/testdb ]$ cat 000000020000000100000030.00000028.backup

START WAL LOCATION: 1/30000028 (file 000000020000000100000030)
STOP WAL LOCATION: 1/30006338 (file 000000020000000100000030)
CHECKPOINT LOCATION: 1/30006268
BACKUP METHOD: pg_start_backup
BACKUP FROM: master
START TIME: 2020-04-12 15:10:52 GMT
LABEL: full_backup
START TIMELINE: 2
STOP TIME: 2020-04-12 15:10:53 GMT
STOP TIMELINE: 2
  • START WAL LOCATION : ліөкө¬лҘј мң„н•ң мӢңмһ‘м җ
  • CHECKPOINT LOCATION : pg_start_backupлҘј мӢӨн–үн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң л°ңмғқн•ң мІҙнҒ¬нҸ¬мқёнҠёк°Җ кё°лЎқлҗң LSN мң„м№ҳ
postgres=# select pg_walfile_name ('1/30006268');
     pg_walfile_name
--------------------------
 000000020000000100000031
(1 row)
  • BACKUP METHOD : л°ұм—… л°©мӢқм—җ лҢҖн•ң м„ӨлӘ…. pg_start_backup лҳҗлҠ” pg_basebackup к°’мқ„ к°–лҠ”лӢӨ
  • BACKUP FROM : л°ұм—…мқҙ primaryмҷҖ standby мӨ‘м—җ м–ҙл””м—җм„ң л°ңмғқн–ҲлҠ”м§Җ кё°лЎқн•ңлӢӨ
  • START TIME : pg_start_backupк°Җ мӢӨн–үлҗң мӢңк°„
  • LABEL : pg_start_backup мӢӨн–үмӢң мһ…л Ҙн•ң лқјлІЁ к°’

л°ұм—… мҲҳн–ү мӢң л°ұм—… мӢңмһ‘кіј мҷ„лЈҢ мӢңм җмқҳ WAL LOCATION м •ліҙк°Җ лӮЁкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ ліөкө¬ мӢң лӘЁл“  WAL archive нҢҢмқјмқ„ мқҪмқ„ н•„мҡ”м—ҶмқҢ
START WAL LOCATION л¶Җн„° recover_target_time м—җ н•ҙлӢ№н•ҳлҠ” WAL logfile к№Ңм§Җ н•„мҡ”н•Ё

  • data мӮӯм ң
postgres=# call insert_test_data(10);
CALL

postgres=# select now(), count(*) from tb_test;
             now              | count
------------------------------+--------
 2020-04-13 00:12:54.00624+09 | 200000
(1 row)


postgres=# truncate public.tb_test;

=>truncate м§Ғм „ 20л§ҢкұҙмңјлЎң ліөкө¬мӢңлҸ„

  • backup ліёмңјлЎң ліөкө¬ мҲҳн–ү
### DB STOP

### backup ліё $PGDATA лЎң copy
[irteam@testserver1 23:30:19 ~/psql/backup/testdb/home1/irteam/psql ]$ ls
arch  data  engn  indx  testdb


### $/PGDATA/recovery.conf м„Өм •

cat recovery.conf

restore_command = 'cp /home1/irteam/psql/arch/testdb/%f %p'
recovery_target_time = '2020-04-13 00:12:54'

==> wal archive logfileмқ„ pg_wal л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лЎң к°Җм ёмҳӨкі  мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” мӢңк°„лҢҖлЎң ліөкө¬н•ҳлҸ„лЎқ м„Өм •  
DB кё°лҸҷ мӢң recovery.conf лҘј мқҪкі  н•„мҡ”н•ң м•„м№ҙмқҙлёҢ нҢҢмқјмқ„ м Ғмҡ©н•ҳкІҢлҗЁ  

### DB start


### recovery мҷ„лЈҢ
postgres=# select now(), count(*) from public.tb_test;
              now              | count
-------------------------------+--------
 2020-04-13 00:16:55.094237+09 | 200000
(1 row)
  • recovery log
2020-04-12 15:16:23 GMT LOG:  restored log file "00000002.history" from archive
2020-04-12 15:16:23 GMT LOG:  restored log file "000000020000000100000030" from archive

2020-04-12 15:16:23 GMT LOG:  redo starts at 1/30000028
2020-04-12 15:16:23 GMT LOG:  consistent recovery state reached at 1/30006338
=> л°ұм—… м§„н–ү мӨ‘ ліҖкІҪмӮ¬н•ӯ м Ғмҡ©

2020-04-12 15:16:23 GMT LOG:  database system is ready to accept read only connections
2020-04-12 15:16:24 GMT LOG:  restored log file "000000020000000100000031" from archive
2020-04-12 15:16:24 GMT LOG:  restored log file "000000020000000100000032" from archive
2020-04-12 15:16:24 GMT LOG:  recovery stopping before commit of transaction 1966, time 2020-04-13 00:13:19.690669+09
2020-04-12 15:16:24 GMT LOG:  recovery has paused
2020-04-12 15:16:24 GMT HINT:  Execute pg_wal_replay_resume() to continue.

=> л°ұм—… мқҙнӣ„ ~ recovery_target_time  мӮ¬мқҙмқҳ лҚ°мқҙн„° л°ҳмҳҒ  
archive л°ҳмҳҒ нӣ„ лҚ°мқҙн„° ліөкө¬лҠ” мҷ„лЈҢ лҗҳм–ҙлҸ„ DBлҠ” кі„мҶҚ recovery мғҒнғң (read_only )мқҙкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ м •мғҒнҷ” н•ҙм•јн•Ё
  • recovery мғҒнғң н•ҙм ң
postgres=# call insert_test_data(1);
ERROR:  cannot execute INSERT in a read-only transaction


postgres=# SELECT pg_wal_replay_resume();
 pg_wal_replay_resume
----------------------

(1 row)

postgres=# call insert_test_data(1);
CALL

item.title: PostgreSQL pgpoolмқ„ нҷңмҡ©н•ң auto-failover кө¬м„ұ
item.description:
Pgpool-II мқҙлһҖ?

  • Pgpool-II лҠ” PostgreSQL DBм„ңлІ„мҷҖ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё мӮ¬мқҙм—җ мң„м№ҳн•ҳлҠ” proxy к°ңл…җмқҳ лҜёл“ӨмӣЁм–ҙлЎң м•„лһҳмқҳ м„ёк°Җм§Җ кё°лҠҘмқ„ м ңкіөн•Ё
  • connection pooling : DBм„ңлІ„мҷҖмқҳ м—°кІ°мқ„ мң м§Җн•ҳкі  лҸҷмқјн•ң мҶҚм„ұ(user,db,protocol) мқ„ к°Җм§„ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ м—°кІ° мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мҳӨл©ҙ мқҙлҘј мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©н•Ё
  • load balancing : replication мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” м„ңл№„мҠӨм—җм„ң DBм„ңлІ„мқҳ нҺёмӨ‘лҗң loadлҘј мӨ„мқҙкё° мң„н•ҙ SELECT мҝјлҰ¬лҘј мІҳлҰ¬ к°ҖлҠҘн•ң м„ңлІ„ к°„ л°°нҸ¬н•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘ
  • automated failover : DB м„ңлІ„ мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳк°Җ downлҗҳл©ҙ мқҙлҘј м°ЁлӢЁн•ҳкі  лӮҳлЁём§Җ DBм—җм„ң м„ңл№„мҠӨлҘј м§ҖмҶҚн•Ё, master down лҗ  мӢңм—” лӢӨлҘё standby м„ңлІ„лҘј мҠ№кІ©мӢңнӮҙ

PGPool кө¬м„ұл°©лІ•

pgpool м„Өм№ҳ

  • https://pgpool.net/mediawiki/index.php/Main_Page 2020.04 кё°мӨҖ мөңмӢ  stable лІ„м „мқё 4.0 мӮ¬мҡ©

  • yum

yum install http://www.pgpool.net/yum/rpms/4.0/redhat/rhel-6-x86_64/pgpool-II-release-4.0-1.noarch.rpm
  • yum м•Ҳлҗ  л•Ң
yum install -y memcached
rpm -ivh pgpool-II-pg11-4.0.8-1pgdg.rhel6.x86_64.rpm
rpm -ivh pgpool-II-pg11-debuginfo-4.0.8-1pgdg.rhel6.x86_64.rpm
rpm -ivh pgpool-II-pg11-devel-4.0.8-1pgdg.rhel6.x86_64.rpm
rpm -ivh pgpool-II-pg11-extensions-4.0.8-1pgdg.rhel6.x86_64.rpm

pgpool.conf м„Өм •

  • vi /etc/pgpool-II/pgpool.conf
sudo cp /etc/pgpool-II/pgpool.conf.sample-stream pgpool.conf

=> pgpool.conf sample нҢҢмқјмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳкі  н•„мҡ”н•ң нҢҢлқјлҜён„°л§Ң мҲҳм •

  • conf нҢҢмқј мҲҳм • лӮҙмҡ©
...
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONNECTIONS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# - pgpool Connection Settings -
listen_addresses = '*'
port = 4000
socket_dir = '/tmp/.s.PGSQL.3000'
...
# - Backend Connection Settings -
backend_hostname0 = 'PRIMARY IP address'
backend_port0 = 3000
backend_weight0 = 1
backend_data_directory0 = '/home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL'
backend_flag0 = 'ALLOW_TO_FAILOVER'

backend_hostname1 = 'STANDBY IP address'
backend_port1 = 3000
backend_weight1 = 1
backend_data_directory1 = '/home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL'
backend_flag1 = 'ALLOW_TO_FAILOVER'
...
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FILE LOCATIONS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
pid_file_name = '/var/run/pgpool.pid'
logdir = '/home1/testuser/psql/logs/$мӢңмҠӨн…ңлӘ…/'
...
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LOAD BALANCING MODE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
load_balance_mode = on
...
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MASTER/SLAVE MODE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
master_slave_mode = on
master_slave_sub_mode = 'stream'
...
# - Streaming -
sr_check_period = 5
sr_check_user = 'repl'
sr_check_password = 'qhdks123'

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FAILOVER AND FAILBACK
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

failover_command = '/usr/pgsql-11/share/failover.sh %d %H /home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL/failover_trigger'
...
  • pgpool Connection Settings : мҷёл¶Җм—җм„ң pgpoolлЎң м ‘мҶҚн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  м ‘мҶҚ м •ліҙ
  • Backend Connection Setting : Clusterм—җ мҶҚн•ң DB м •ліҙ лӘ…мӢңн•ҳлҠ” л¶Җл¶„, backend_weight : load-balancing л¶„мӮ° л№„мңЁ м„Өм •, backend_flag : failover кё°лҠҘ мӮ¬мҡ© ‘ALLOW_TO_FAILOVER'лЎң м„Өм •
  • LOAD BALANCING MODE : load balance кё°лҠҘ мӮ¬мҡ© м„Өм •
  • MASTER/SLAVE MODE : нҳ„мһ¬ Streaming Replicationмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі  мһҲкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ master_slave_sub_modeлҠ” ‘stream'мңјлЎң м„Өм •
  • Streaming : Streaming Replication мғҒнғң мІҙнҒ¬лҘј мң„н•ң м„Өм •мңјлЎң 5мҙҲл§ҲлӢӨ repl кі„м •мңјлЎң мғҒнғң Check н•Ё
  • failover_command : pgpool м—җм„ң Cluster лӮҙ DB м„ңлІ„м—җ мқҙмғҒмқ„ к°җм§Җн•ҳл©ҙ мӢӨн–үн•ҳлҠ” м»Өл§Ёл“ң
 '/usr/pgsql-9.6/share/failover.sh %d %H /var/lib/pgsql/9.6/data/failover_trigger'

=> %d : мқҙмғҒнҳ„мғҒмқҙ л°ңмғқн•ң node id , %H : new masterк°Җ лҗ  node id standby м„ңлІ„м—җ failover_trigger нҢҢмқјмқҙ мғқкё°л©ҙ primary server лЎң мҠ№кІ©н•ҳкІ лӢӨлҠ” мқҳлҜё

failover.sh мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠё мһ‘м„ұ

  • vi /usr/pgsql-11/share/failover.sh
if [ $# -ne 3 ]
then
        echo "failover failed_node new_master trigger_file"
        exit 1
fi
 
FAILED_NODE=$1
NEW_MASTER=$2
TRIGGER_FILE=$3
 
# Do nothing if standby server goes down
if [$FAILED_NODE = 1]; then
        echo "Standby Server is downed\n" >> /etc/pgpool-II/failover.log
        exit 0
fi
 
echo "failover.sh FAILED_NODE:${FAILED_NODE}; NEW_MASTER:${NEW_MASTER}; at $(date)\n" >> /etc/pgpool-II/failover.log
 
sudo -u testuser ssh -T testuser@$NEW_MASTER touch $TRIGGER_FILE
 
exit 0

=> Primay м„ңлІ„м—җ мқҙмғҒмқҙ мғқкё°л©ҙ Standby м„ңлІ„м—җ failover trigger нҢҢмқјмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳм—¬ standby м„ңлІ„к°Җ мҠ№кІ©лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ н•Ё

ssh key м„Өм •

ssh-keygen -t rsa мҲҳн–ү нӣ„
м„ңлЎңмқҳ id_rsa.pub >> authorized_keys мһ‘м—…

=> failover.sh мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠём—җм„ң ssh лҘј нҶөн•ҙ trigger fileмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ pgpool м„ңлІ„ <-> DB м„ңлІ„ к°„ ssh мқёмҰқ м„Өм •н•„мҡ”

pgpool кё°лҸҷ

  • pgpool кё°лҸҷ
[testusersu@psql-server-1 15:38:26 /etc/pgpool-II ]$ sudo pgpool


[testuser@psql-server-1 15:40:42 ~/psql/logs/testdb ]$ ps -ef | grep pgpool
root     42462     1  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool
root     42463 42462  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool: wait for connection request
root     42464 42462  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool: wait for connection request
.
.
.
root     42496 42462  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool: PCP: wait for connection request
root     42497 42462  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool: worker process
root     42498 42462  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool: health check process(0)
root     42499 42462  0 15:38 ?        00:00:00 pgpool: health check process(1)
  • м ‘мҶҚ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
[testuser@psql-server-2 15:38:32 ~ ]$ psql -h <pgpool IP>  -p 4000 -d postgres
psql (11.7)
Type "help" for help.

postgres=# \x
Expanded display is on.

postgres=# show pool_nodes;
-[ RECORD 1 ]------+--------------------
node_id            | 0
hostname           | psql-server-1
port               | 3000
status             | up
lb_weight          | 0.500000
role               | primary
select_cnt         | 16
load_balance_node  | false
replication_delay  | 0
last_status_change | 2020-04-09 18:56:42
-[ RECORD 2 ]------+--------------------
node_id            | 1
hostname           | psql-server-2
port               | 3000
status             | up
lb_weight          | 0.500000
role               | standby
select_cnt         | 19
load_balance_node  | true
replication_delay  | 0
last_status_change | 2020-04-09 18:56:42

=> client лҠ” pgpoolмқҳ ip/port лЎң м ‘мҶҚн•ҳл©° load_balancing м„Өм •м—җ мқҳн•ҙ 1:1 лЎң мҝјлҰ¬ л¶„мӮ°лҗЁ

failover test

нҳ„мһ¬ мғҒнғң мІҙнҒ¬

postgres=# show pool_nodes;
-[ RECORD 1 ]------+--------------------
node_id            | 0
hostname           | psql-server-1
port               | 3000
status             | up
lb_weight          | 0.500000
role               | primary
select_cnt         | 0
load_balance_node  | true
replication_delay  | 0
last_status_change | 2020-04-10 10:11:15
-[ RECORD 2 ]------+--------------------
node_id            | 1
hostname           | psql-server-2
port               | 3000
status             | up
lb_weight          | 0.500000
role               | standby
select_cnt         | 0
load_balance_node  | false
replication_delay  | 0
last_status_change | 2020-04-10 10:11:15

Primary stop & лЎңк·ё нҷ•мқё

  • primary stop
[testuser@psql-server-1 10:10:48 ~ ]$ stop
waiting for server to shut down.... done
server stopped
  • standby log
### error_log 

2020-04-10 01:11:49 GMT LOG:  replication terminated by primary server
2020-04-10 01:11:49 GMT DETAIL:  End of WAL reached on timeline 1 at 0/7C000098.
2020-04-10 01:11:49 GMT FATAL:  could not send end-of-streaming message to primary: no COPY in progress
2020-04-10 01:11:49 GMT LOG:  invalid record length at 0/7C000098: wanted 24, got 0
2020-04-10 01:11:49 GMT FATAL:  could not connect to the primary server: server closed the connection unexpectedly
                This probably means the server terminated abnormally
                before or while processing the request.
2020-04-10 01:11:54 GMT LOG:  trigger file found: /home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL/failover_trigger
2020-04-10 01:11:54 GMT LOG:  redo done at 0/7C000028
2020-04-10 01:11:54 GMT LOG:  last completed transaction was at log time 2020-04-10 10:11:49.045489+09
2020-04-10 01:11:54 GMT LOG:  selected new timeline ID: 2
2020-04-10 01:11:54 GMT LOG:  archive recovery complete
2020-04-10 01:11:54 GMT LOG:  database system is ready to accept connections

### read_only ON=>OFF 
postgres=# select name,setting from pg_settings where name like '%read%';
             name              | setting
-------------------------------+---------
 default_transaction_read_only | off
 transaction_read_only         | off
(2 rows)

=> primary мҷҖ ліөм ң лҒҠкёҙ кІғ нҷ•мқё pgpool failover command м—җ мқҳн•ҙ мғқм„ұлҗң failover trigerr file нҷ•мқё recovery.conf failover_trigger мҳөм…ҳм—җ мқҳн•ҙ primary лЎң мҠ№кІ©мӢңнӮҙ

failover м •мғҒ мІҙнҒ¬

postgres=# show pool_nodes;
-[ RECORD 1 ]------+--------------------
node_id            | 0
hostname           | psql-server-1
port               | 3000
status             | down
lb_weight          | 0.500000
role               | standby
select_cnt         | 0
load_balance_node  | false
replication_delay  | 0
last_status_change | 2020-04-10 10:11:54
-[ RECORD 2 ]------+--------------------
node_id            | 1
hostname           | psql-server-2
port               | 3000
status             | up
lb_weight          | 0.500000
role               | primary
select_cnt         | 2
load_balance_node  | true
replication_delay  | 0
last_status_change | 2020-04-10 10:11:54

failover нӣ„ м¶”к°Җмһ‘м—…

failover нӣ„ old masterлҘј мҳ¬л ӨлҸ„ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң slave лЎң м¶”к°ҖлҗҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘмқҖ м ңкіөлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кіјм •мқ„ мҲҳлҸҷмңјлЎң м§„н–үн•ңлӢӨ

  • нҳ„мһ¬ мғҒнғң
postgres=# show pool_nodes;
 node_id |     hostname      | port | status | lb_weight |  role   | select_cnt | load_balance_node | replication_delay | last_status_c
hange
---------+-------------------+------+--------+-----------+---------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+--------------
-------
 0       | psql-server-1 | 3000 | down   | 0.500000  | standby | 0          | false             | 0                 | 2020-04-22 14
:28:21
 1       | psql-server-2 | 3000 | up     | 0.500000  | primary | 0          | true              | 0                 | 2020-04-22 14
:28:21
(2 rows)

=> old master t1801 м„ңлІ„к°Җ failover лҗҳм–ҙ t1802 к°Җ new master к°Җ лҗң мғҒнҷ© t1801 м„ңлІ„лҘј мҳ¬л ӨлҸ„ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң slaveлЎң м¶”к°Җлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©° pgpool мқҖ мқҙ м„ңлІ„лҘј мқёмӢқн•ҳм§Җ лӘ»н•ҳлҠ” мғҒнғң

  • old master slaveлЎң мһ¬кө¬м„ұ
pg_basebackup -h new_master -p3000 -D /home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL -U repl -P -v -X stream

vi recovery.conf

standby_mode = on
primary_conninfo='host=new_master port=3000 user=repl password=qhdks123'
primary_slot_name='repl_slot_01'
trigger_file='/home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL/failover_trigger'
  • old master up
pg_ctl -D /home1/testuser/psql/engn/PGSQL start
  • pgpool nodeлЎң м¶”к°Җ
[testuser@psql-server-1 14:53:40 ~/psql/logs/testdb/error_log ]$ pcp_attach_node -n 0
Password:
pcp_attach_node -- Command Successful


postgres=# show pool_nodes;
 node_id |     hostname      | port | status | lb_weight |  role   | select_cnt | load_balance_node | replication_delay | last_status_c
hange
---------+-------------------+------+--------+-----------+---------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+--------------
-------
 0       | psql-server-1 | 3000 | up     | 0.500000  | standby | 0          | true              | 0                 | 2020-04-22 14
:55:26
 1       | psql-server-2 | 3000 | up     | 0.500000  | primary | 6          | false             | 0                 | 2020-04-22 14
:28:21
(2 rows)

=> old master к°Җ new masterмқҳ slave node лЎң м¶”к°ҖлҗЁ

item.title: PostgreSQL Replication м„Өм •-Streaming Replication
item.description:
REPLICATION л°©мӢқ

log shipping

  • file-based ліөм ңлЎң masterмқҳ WAL fileмқҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳл©ҙ мқҙ нҢҢмқјмқ„ scpлҘј нҶөн•ҙ standbyм„ңлІ„лЎң м „лӢ¬н•ҳм—¬ л°ҳмҳҒн•Ё
  • wal fileмқҙ мғқкёё л•Ң к№Ңм§Җ replication gap мқҙ л°ңмғқн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ

logical replication

  • pub / sub кө¬мЎ°лЎң м–‘л°©н–Ҙ replication к°ҖлҠҘ
  • нҠ№м • н…Ңмқҙлё”л§Ң ліөм ңн•ҳлҠ” partial replication к°ҖлҠҘ
  • DDL ліөм ңлҠ” м•Ҳлҗҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ к°Ғк°Ғ мҲҳн–үн•ҙмӨҳм•јн•Ё

streaming replication

  • MasterлҠ” standyby м—җкІҢ transaction log entires лҘј м „лӢ¬н•ҳкі  standby лҠ” WAL fileмқ„ кё°лӢӨлҰ¬м§Җ м•Ҡкі  record лӢЁмң„лЎң ліөм ң мҲҳн–ү
  • мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң к°ҖмһҘ л§Һмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” ліөм ң л°©мӢқ

streaming replication м„Өм •

1. replication мҡ© user мғқм„ұ (master)

postgres=# create user repl replication password 'qhdks123';
CREATE ROLE

postgres=# \du
                                   List of roles
 Role name |                         Attributes                         | Member of
-----------+------------------------------------------------------------+-----------
 kimdubi    | Superuser, Create role, Create DB, Replication, Bypass RLS | {}
 repl      | Replication                                                | {}
 testuser  | No inheritance                                            +| {}
           | Password valid until infinity                              |

2. postgresql.conf мҲҳм • (master)

  • vi /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/postgresql.conf
wal_level = logical лҳҗлҠ” hot_standby
archive_mode = on
archive_command = 'cp %p /home1/kimdubi/psql/arch/testdb/%f'
#max_wal_senders = 10
#max_replication_slots = 10
  • мҢ“мқҙлҠ” archive logfileмқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м •лҰ¬ н•„мҡ”
pg_archivecleanup /home1/kimdubi/psql/arch/testdb 000000010000000000000081.00000028.backup

=> xxxx.backup мқҙм „мқҳ м•„м№ҙмқҙлёҢ нҢҢмқј лӘЁл‘җ мӮӯм ң

  • postgresql.conf мҲҳм • нӣ„ reload
pg_ctl reload -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL

3. pg_hba.conf мҲҳм • (master)

  • vi /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/postgresql.conf м•„лһҳ лӮҙмҡ© м¶”к°Җ
host    replication     repl             10.161.78.34/32            md5

=> standby server (10.161.78.34) м—җм„ң repl USERлЎң replicationмқ„ мң„н•ҙ мҳӨлҠ” м»Өл„Ҙм…ҳ мҡ”мІӯмқҖ md5лЎң мқёмҰқн•ҙм„ң н—Ҳк°Җн•Ё

  • pg_hba.conf мҲҳм • нӣ„ reload
pg_ctl reload -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL

4. replication slot мғқм„ұ (master)


postgres=# SELECT * FROM pg_create_physical_replication_slot('repl_slot_01');
  slot_name   | lsn
--------------+-----
 repl_slot_01 |
(1 row)

postgres=# select * from pg_replication_slots;
  slot_name   | plugin | slot_type | datoid | database | temporary | active | active_pid | xmin | catalog_xmin | restart_lsn | confirme
d_flush_lsn
--------------+--------+-----------+--------+----------+-----------+--------+------------+------+--------------+-------------+---------
------------
 repl_slot_01 |        | physical  |        |          | f         | f      |            |      |              |             |
(1 row)

=> standby м„ңлІ„к°Җ replicationмқ„ л”°лқјк°Җм§Җ лӘ»н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°лҘј лҢҖл№„н•ҳм—¬ WAL лЎңк·ёлҘј replication_slotм—җ л‘җкі  ліҙкҙҖн•ҳкІ лӢӨлҠ” мқҳлҜё
replication_slotмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ wal_keep_segments м„Өм •мқҙ н•„мҡ”м—ҶмқҢ

5. Primary DB server copy (standby)

### кё°мЎҙ data мҳҒм—ӯ мӮӯм ң 
[kimdubi@testserver2 15:37:09 ~/psql/engn ]$ rm -rf /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL

### Primary server => standby server copy

[kimdubi@testserver2 15:40:06 ~/psql/engn ]$ pg_basebackup -h 11.111.11.11 -p3000 -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL -U repl -P -v -X stream
Password:


pg_basebackup: initiating base backup, waiting for checkpoint to complete
pg_basebackup: checkpoint completed
pg_basebackup: write-ahead log start point: 0/6000028 on timeline 1
pg_basebackup: starting background WAL receiver
pg_basebackup: created temporary replication slot "pg_basebackup_64119"
31584/31584 kB (100%), 5/5 tablespaces
pg_basebackup: write-ahead log end point: 0/60000F8
pg_basebackup: waiting for background process to finish streaming ...
pg_basebackup: base backup completed
  • pg_basebackup -h primary_host -p primary_port -D PGDATA -U replication user

6. recovery.conf м„Өм • (standby)

  • vi /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/recovery.conf
standby_mode = on
primary_conninfo='host=11.111.11.11 port=3000 user=repl password=qhdks123'
primary_slot_name='repl_slot_01'
#trigger_file='/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/failover_trigger'

7. DB кё°лҸҷ (standby)

[kimdubi@testserver2 15:45:23 ~/psql/engn/PGSQL ]$ pg_ctl -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL start

waiting for server to start....2020-04-08 06:45:25 GMT LOG:  listening on IPv4 address "0.0.0.0", port 3000
2020-04-08 06:45:25 GMT LOG:  listening on IPv6 address "::", port 3000
2020-04-08 06:45:25 GMT LOG:  listening on Unix socket "/tmp/.s.PGSQL.3000"
2020-04-08 06:45:25 GMT LOG:  redirecting log output to logging collector process
2020-04-08 06:45:25 GMT HINT:  Future log output will appear in directory "/home1/kimdubi/psql/logs/testdb/error_log".
 done
server started

8. replication нҷ•мқё

  • master
postgres=# \x
Expanded display is on.
postgres=# select * from pg_stat_replication;
-[ RECORD 1 ]----+-----------------------------
pid              | 65010
usesysid         | 16396
usename          | repl
application_name | walreceiver
client_addr      | 22.222.22.22
client_hostname  |
client_port      | 56754
backend_start    | 2020-04-08 16:05:07.00658+09
backend_xmin     |
state            | streaming
sent_lsn         | 0/B015A10
write_lsn        | 0/B015A10
flush_lsn        | 0/B015A10
replay_lsn       | 0/B015A10
write_lag        |
flush_lag        |
replay_lag       |
sync_priority    | 0
sync_state       | async
  • slave
### error_log 

2020-04-08 07:05:07 GMT LOG:  started streaming WAL from primary at 0/B000000 on timeline 1
  • replication delay нҷ•мқё (slaveм—җм„ң мЎ°нҡҢ)
SELECT CASE WHEN pg_last_wal_receive_lsn() = pg_last_wal_replay_lsn()
THEN 0
ELSE EXTRACT (EPOCH FROM now() - pg_last_xact_replay_timestamp())
END AS log_delay;


 log_delay
-----------
         0
(1 row)

replication кө¬м„ұ мӨ‘ л°ңмғқк°ҖлҠҘ м—җлҹ¬

  • standby => primary м ‘к·ј к¶Ңн•ң м—Ҷмқ„ л•Ң
2020-04-08 15:23:50.883 KST [44534] FATAL:  could not connect to the primary server: FATAL:  no pg_hba.conf entry for replication connection from host "22.222.22.22", user "repl"

=> primary serverмқҳ м ‘к·јн—Ҳмҡ© лҰ¬мҠӨнҠём—җ standby м„ңлІ„ м •ліҙк°Җ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ° л°ңмғқн•Ё primaryм—җм„ң pg_hba.conf м—җ standby м„ңлІ„ м¶”к°Җ нӣ„ reload

  • standby м„ңлІ„ мҙҲкё°нҷ” м•Ҳн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң
2020-04-08 15:26:51.084 KST [44642] FATAL:  database system identifier differs between the primary and standby
2020-04-08 15:26:51.084 KST [44642] DETAIL:  The primary's identifier is 6812776914427724112, the standby's identifier is 6813221629551992171.

=> standby м„ңлІ„ $PGDATA мҳҒм—ӯ мӮӯм ң нӣ„ лӢӨмӢң pg_basebackup мҲҳн–ү

item.title: PostgreSQL configure м„Өм •
item.description:
yum м„Өм№ҳк°Җ м•„лӢҢ source make м„Өм№ҳлқј л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ кө¬м„ұ л“ұмқҙ лӢӨлҘј мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

bash_profile

$ vi ~/.bash_profile

export POSTGRES_HOME=/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7
export PGLIB=$POSTGRES_HOME/lib
export PGDATA=/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL
export MANPATH=$MANPATH:$POSTGRES_HOME/man

export PATH=$POSTGRES_HOME/bin:$PATH

postgresql.conf

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONNECTIONS AND AUTHENTICATION
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# - Connection Settings -
listen_addresses = '*'
port = 3000
max_connections = 1000

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# RESOURCE USAGE (except WAL)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# - Memory -
shared_buffers = 1024MB    
work_mem = 4MB   
maintenance_work_mem = 512MB 

dynamic_shared_memory_type = posix
effective_io_concurrency = 200

max_worker_processes=8
max_parallel_workers_per_gather = 2
max_parallel_workers = 8

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# WRITE AHEAD LOG
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# - Settings -
wal_level = logical
wal_buffers = 2MB
max_wal_size = 1GB

# - Archiving -
archive_mode = on
archive_command = 'cp %p /home1/kimdubi/psql/arch/testdb/%f'

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# QUERY TUNING
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

random_page_cost = 1.1
default_statistics_target = 100
effective_cache_size = 3GB   # max. Physical M * 0.75

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ERROR REPORTING AND LOGGING
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# - Where to Log -
log_destination = 'stderr'
logging_collector = on
log_directory = '/home1/kimdubi/psql/logs/testdb/error_log'
log_filename = 'alert_testdb.log'

# - What to Log -
log_line_prefix = '%t '

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CLIENT CONNECTION DEFAULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# - Statement Behavior -
search_path = '"$user"'
temp_tablespaces = 'TS_TEMP'

timezone='Asia/Seoul'
lc_messages = 'en_US.UTF-8' 
lc_monetary = 'en_US.UTF-8' 
lc_numeric = 'en_US.UTF-8' 
lc_time = 'en_US.UTF-8' 
default_text_search_config = 'pg_catalog.english'
  • shared_buffer : data buffer , м „мІҙ м„ңлІ„ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬мқҳ 1/4 ~ 1/3 к¶ҢмһҘ
  • work_mem : sort,hash join л“ұ query мҲҳн–ү мӢң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” session memory, tempfile мғқм„ұмқҙ л§Һмңјл©ҙ лҚ” нҒ¬кІҢ м„Өм • н•„мҡ”
  • maintenance_work_mem : vacuum, create index м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” л©”лӘЁлҰ¬, м „мІҙ м„ңлІ„ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬мқҳ 1/16 ~ 2GB(max)
  • max_worker_processes : scan, group by, join мһ‘м—…м—җ лі‘л ¬мІҳлҰ¬лҘј м§Җмӣҗн•Ё. parallel мІҳлҰ¬лҘј мҲҳн–үн•ҳлҠ” worker н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨмқҳ мөңлҢҖ к°ңмҲҳ
  • max_parallel_workers_per_gather : н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ мҝјлҰ¬ лӢ№ мҲҳн–ү к°ҖлҠҘн•ң мөңлҢҖ worker н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨ к°ңмҲҳ (defalut 0 - parallel мІҳлҰ¬ мҲҳн–ү м•Ҳн•Ё)
  • wal_level : WAL нҢҢмқјм—җ кё°лЎқлҗҳлҠ” м •ліҙмқҳ мҲҳмӨҖ м„Өм • , mysql лЎң л№„көҗн•ҳл©ҙ logical - ROW, replica - MIXED
  • wal_buffers : нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳ лЎңк·ё(WAL log) лІ„нҚј , shared_buffers мқҳ 1/32 к¶ҢмһҘ
  • archive_command : WAL fileмқ„ м•„м№ҙмқҙлёҢн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  м»Өл§Ёл“ң, %p лҠ” WAL лЎңк·ёнҢҢмқјмқҳ м ҲлҢҖкІҪлЎң %f лҠ” ліҙкҙҖн•  лЎңк·ёнҢҢмқј мқҙлҰ„
  • random_page_cost : random I/O cost м¶”м •к°’мңјлЎң лҶ’мңјл©ҙ н’ҖмҠӨмә” м„ нҳё, мғҒлҢҖм ҒмңјлЎң мӨ„мқҙл©ҙ мқёлҚұмҠӨ мҠӨмә”мқ„ м„ нҳён•Ё default 4.0
  • effective_cache_size : query planner м—җкІҢ к°Җмҡ©н•ң caching dataмқҳ нҒ¬кё°лҘј м•Ңл ӨмӨҳм„ң cost мҳҲмёЎм—җ лҸ„мӣҖмқ„ мЈјлҠ” м„Өм •. к°’мқҙ лҶ’лӢӨкі  к·ёл§ҢнҒј memoryлҘј м җмң н•ҳм§„ м•Ҡкі  index scanмқ„ н•  к°ҖлҠҘм„ұмқҙ лҶ’м•„м§җ, м „мІҙ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬мқҳ 3/4 к¶ҢмһҘ default 4GB

pg_hba.conf

# TYPE  DATABASE        USER            ADDRESS                 METHOD

# "local" is for Unix domain socket connections only
local   all             all                                     trust
# IPv4 local connections:
host    all             all             127.0.0.1/32            trust
# IPv6 local connections:
host    all             all             ::1/128                 trust
# Allow replication connections from localhost, by a user with the
# replication privilege.
local   replication     all                                     trust
host    replication     all             127.0.0.1/32            trust
host    replication     all             ::1/128                 trust

=> postgresql м ‘мҶҚ мқёмҰқ кҙҖл Ё м„Өм •мңјлЎң oracle мқҳ sqlnet.ora , cubridмқҳ broker.access & iplist нҢҢмқј, mysqlмқҳ user@host мҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ к°ңл…җ

  • мҳҲмӢң 1) local м—җм„ң лӘЁл“  мң м Җк°Җ нҢЁмҠӨмӣҢл“ңм—Ҷмқҙ (trust) лӘЁл“  лҚ°мқҙн„°лІ мқҙмҠӨм—җ м ‘мҶҚ н—Ҳмҡ©
# TYPE  DATABASE        USER            ADDRESS                 METHOD
local   all             all                                     trust
  • мҳҲмӢң 2) 111.111.11.x лҢҖм—ӯмқҳ лӘЁл“  нҳёмҠӨнҠёлҠ” testdb DBм—җ testuser кі„м •мңјлЎң md5 мқёмҰқл°©мӢқмңјлЎңл§Ң м ‘мҶҚ н—Ҳмҡ©
# TYPE  DATABASE        USER            ADDRESS                 METHOD
  host   testdb         testuser        111.111.11.0/24           md5

м°ёкі  мӮ¬мқҙнҠё

  • https://www.postgresql.org/docs/11/index.html
  • https://postgresql.kr/blog/simple_postgresql_conf.html

item.title: PostgreSQL source compile install
item.description:
к°„лӢЁн•ҳкІҢ yum install н•  мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲм§Җл§Ң
л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ кө¬м„ұ л“ұмқ„ кё°ліё default м„Өм •кіјлҠ” лӢӨлҘҙкІҢ кө¬м„ұн•ҳм—¬ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳкі  мӢ¶м–ҙ source нҢҢмқјмқ„ лӢӨмҡҙл°ӣм•„ м»ҙнҢҢмқј м„Өм№ҳн•ҳлҠ” мӢқмңјлЎң кө¬м„ұн•ҙлҙӨмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
л•Ңл¬ём—җ м—¬кё°м„ңмқҳ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҠ” default м„Өм •мқҙ м•„лӢҢ м ң мһ„мқҳлЎң м„Өм •н•ң кө¬м„ұмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

postgresql лІ„м „ нҷ•мқё

  • https://www.postgresql.org/ftp/source/

м„Өм№ҳ

  • directory мғқм„ұ (kimdubi кі„м •)
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/    => PostgreSQL engine мҳҒм—ӯ
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb  => tablespace л“ұdata м ҖмһҘкіөк°„
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/logs/testdb/error_log  => error log 
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/arch/testdb  => pg_wal м•„м№ҙмқҙл№ҷн•ҳлҠ” кіөк°„
  • 11.7 лІ„м „ download & м••м¶•н•ҙм ң
[kimdubi@testserver 15:34:53 ~/psql/engn ]$ pwd
/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn

wget https://ftp.postgresql.org/pub/source/v11.7/postgresql-11.7.tar.gz
tar zxvpf postgresql-11.7.tar.gz
  • make install
[kimdubi@testserver 20:09:06 ~/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7 ]$ pwd
/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7


./configure --prefix=/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7/ --enable-depend --enable-nls=utf8 --with-python
make
make install
  • DB м„Өм№ҳ
[kimdubi@testserver 20:07:47 ~/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7/bin ]$ pwd
/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7/bin

### initdb м»Өл§Ёл“ң мҲҳн–ү -D datadir
 ./initdb -E utf8 -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/ 
 
 
 ### м„Өм№ҳ мҲҳн–ү лЎңк·ё

The files belonging to this database system will be owned by user "kimdubi".
This user must also own the server process.

The database cluster will be initialized with locale "C".
The default text search configuration will be set to "english".

Data page checksums are disabled.

fixing permissions on existing directory /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL ... ok
creating subdirectories ... ok
selecting default max_connections ... 100
selecting default shared_buffers ... 128MB
selecting default timezone ... ROK
selecting dynamic shared memory implementation ... posix
creating configuration files ... ok
running bootstrap script ... ok
performing post-bootstrap initialization ... ok
syncing data to disk ... ok

WARNING: enabling "trust" authentication for local connections
You can change this by editing pg_hba.conf or using the option -A, or
--auth-local and --auth-host, the next time you run initdb.

Success. You can now start the database server using:

    ./pg_ctl -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/ -l logfile start
  • м„Өм№ҳ нҷ•мқё & нҢҢлқјлҜён„° мҲҳм •
[kimdubi@testserver 10:39:21 ~/psql/engn/PGSQL ]$ pwd
/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL

[kimdubi@testserver 10:39:33 ~/psql/engn/PGSQL ]$ ls
PG_VERSION  pg_commit_ts  pg_ident.conf  pg_notify    pg_snapshots  pg_subtrans  pg_wal                postgresql.conf
base        pg_dynshmem   pg_logical     pg_replslot  pg_stat       pg_tblspc    pg_xact
global      pg_hba.conf   pg_multixact   pg_serial    pg_stat_tmp   pg_twophase  postgresql.auto.conf


vi postgresql.conf

vi ~./bash_profile

vi pg_hba.conf

=> oracle м„Өм№ҳмҷҖ л№„мҠ·н•ҳкІҢ м—”м§„ м„Өм№ҳ нӣ„ parameter нҢҢмқј м„Өм • & DB кё°лҸҷн•ҳлҠ” мҲңм„ң

  • DB кё°лҸҷ
[kimdubi@testserver 10:49:59 ~/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7/bin ]$ pg_ctl -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/ start
waiting for server to start....2020-04-07 01:50:00 GMT LOG:  listening on IPv4 address "0.0.0.0", port 3000
2020-04-07 01:50:00 GMT LOG:  listening on IPv6 address "::", port 3000
2020-04-07 01:50:00 GMT LOG:  listening on Unix socket "/tmp/.s.PGSQL.3000"
2020-04-07 01:50:00 GMT LOG:  redirecting log output to logging collector process
2020-04-07 01:50:00 GMT HINT:  Future log output will appear in directory "/home1/kimdubi/psql/logs/testdb/error_log".
 done
server started

[kimdubi@testserver 10:50:26 ~/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7/bin ]$ pg_ctl -D /home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL/ status
pg_ctl: server is running (PID: 13079)
/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/postgresql-11.7/bin/postgres "-D" "/home1/kimdubi/psql/engn/PGSQL"

мғқм„ұ нӣ„ мһ‘м—…

  • tablespace / database мғқм„ұ
### TABLESPACE мғқм„ұ
-. OS л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ мғқм„ұ
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb/TS_USER
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb/TS_TEMP
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb/TS_TEST_D
mkdir -p /home1/kimdubi/psql/indx/testdb/TS_TEST_I

-. DB tablespace мғқм„ұ
postgres=# create tablespace TS_USER location '/home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb/TS_USER';
postgres=# create tablespace TS_TEMP location '/home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb/TS_TEMP';
postgres=# create tablespace TS_TEST_D location '/home1/kimdubi/psql/data/testdb/TS_TEST_D';
postgres=# create tablespace TS_TEST_I location '/home1/kimdubi/psql/indx/testdb/TS_TEST_I';
  • USER мғқм„ұ => ліөмһЎн•ҳм§Җл§Ң м„ңл№„мҠӨмҡ© schema, userлҘј лі„лҸ„лЎң мғқм„ұн–ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
    ліҙм•Ҳ л°Ҹ к¶Ңн•ңмңјлЎң мқён•ң мһҘм• лҘј л§үкё° мң„н•ЁмқёлҚ°мҡ”
    PostgreSQLмқҖ ORACLE / MySQL кіј user,role,schema к°ңл…җмқҙ мЎ°кёҲ лӢ¬лқј н—·к°ҲлҰҙ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙ л¶Җл¶„мқҖ лӢӨмқҢ мӢңк°„м—җ лі„лҸ„лЎң лӢӨлЈЁкІ мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
### м„ңл№„мҠӨ кі„м •

create role testuser login password '!dlatl00' noinherit valid until 'infinity';
create schema testuser authorization testuser;
alter role testuser set default_tablespace=ts_test_d;
grant create on tablespace ts_test_d to testuser;
grant create on tablespace ts_test_i to testuser;
grant create on tablespace ts_temp to testuser;

###
postgres=# create database testdb  tablespace='ts_test_d' with owner kimdubi;
CREATE DATABASE
  • к¶Ңн•ң м„Өм •
### super userлЎң db м ‘мҶҚ
testdb=> \c testdb kimdubi

### лӢӨлҘё кі„м •мқҳ м ‘к·ј м°ЁлӢЁ л°Ҹ public schema мӮ¬мҡ© к¶Ңн•ң нҡҢмҲҳ
testdb=# revoke all on database testdb from public;
testdb=# revoke all on schema public from public;

### м„ңл№„мҠӨкі„м •м—җ к¶Ңн•ң м¶”к°Җ
testdb=# create schema testuser authorization testuser;

grant connect,temporary on database testdb to testuser;
grant usage on schema testuser to testuser;
grant select,insert,update,delete on all tables in schema testuser to testuser;
grant usage on all sequences in schema testuser to testuser;
alter default privileges in schema testuser grant select,insert,update,delete on tables to testuser;
alter default privileges in schema testuser grant usage on sequences to testuser;

### мғҲлЎңмҡҙ кі„м • м¶”к°ҖлҗҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°
create role new_testuser login password '!dlatl00' noinherit valid until 'infinity';
grant connect,temporary on database testdb to new_testuser;
grant usage on schema testuser to new_testuser;
grant select,insert,update,delete on all tables in schema testuser to new_testuser;

DB м ‘мҶҚ к¶Ңн•ң нҷ•мқё => schema usage к¶Ңн•ң нҷ•мқё => к°Ғ к°ңлі„ н…Ңмқҙлё” к¶Ңн•ң нҷ•мқё

item.title: PostgreSQL Architecture (PostgreSQL мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкё°)
item.description:
postgresqlмқҖ н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨ кё°л°ҳмқҳ GIS кё°лҠҘмңјлЎң мң лӘ…н•ң мҳӨн”ҲмҶҢмҠӨDB мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
м„ёкі„м Ғмқё мқёкё°(?) м—җ л№„н•ҙ мң лҸ… мҡ°лҰ¬лӮҳлқјм—җм„  postgresql мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кіімқҙ л“ңл¬ёлҚ°
м ҖлҸ„ м•„л¬ҙкІғлҸ„ лӘЁлҘҙм§Җл§Ң м„Өм№ҳл¶Җн„° н•ҳлӮҳн•ҳлӮҳ кіөл¶Җн•ҙк°ҖлҠ” л§ҲмқҢмңјлЎң нҸ¬мҠӨнҢ…мқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкІ мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
м ңк°Җ кө¬м„ұн•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” PostgreSQL м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

м…Ӣм—… нҷҳкІҪ

OS & DB

  • OS : CentOS release 6.9
  • DB : PostgreSQL 11.7 (20.02 кё°мӨҖ postgresql 12 лІ„м „ м¶ңмӢңлҗҳм—ҲмңјлӮҳ м•Ҳм •нҷ”лҗң 11лІ„м „ м„Өм№ҳ)
    • replication : streaming-replication (master-standby)
    • auto-failover : pgpool-II
    • backup : pg_start_backup

м•„лһҳлҠ” мң„ м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ мҡ”мҶҢл“Өм—җ лҢҖн•ң к°„лӢЁн•ң м„ӨлӘ…мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

В PostgreSQL м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ

single

  • н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨ кё°л°ҳ dbmsлЎң oracle кіј м „мІҙм Ғмқё м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳк°Җ мң мӮ¬н•Ё
  • 1к°ңмқҳ connection л§ҲлӢӨ 1к°ңмқҳ background process мғқм„ұлҗЁ
  • postmaster : postgresql кё°лҸҷ мӢң к°ҖмһҘ лЁјм Җ мӢңмһ‘лҗҳлҠ” н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨ. лӢӨлҘё background processлҘј кё°лҸҷн•ҳкі  userмҷҖмқҳ connection мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘмқ„ мҲҳн–ү
  • shared buffer : лҚ°мқҙн„° мәҗмӢұн•ҳлҠ” л©”лӘЁлҰ¬, м„ңлІ„ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬мқҳ 1/4 мқҙмғҒ к¶ҢмһҘлҗЁ
  • WAL buffer : м„ём…ҳл“Өмқҙ мҲҳн–үн•ҳлҠ” нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳм—җ лҢҖн•ң ліҖкІҪ лЎңк·ёлҘј мәҗмӢұн•Ё (redo log) shared buffer мқҳ 1/32 мқҙмғҒ к¶ҢмһҘлҗЁ
  • CLOG buffer : commit log, нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳ мғҒнғңлҘј мәҗмӢұн•ҳлҠ” л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ кіөк°„мңјлЎң нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳмқҙ commit лҗҳм—ҲлҠ”м§ҖлҘј кё°лЎқн•Ё
  • autovacuum : mvccлҘј мң„н•ҙ update /delete мҲҳн–ү мӢң dbм—җ лӢӨмӨ‘ лІ„м „мқҳ л ҲмҪ”л“ңлҘј м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ”лҚ° vacuum мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ лҚ”мқҙмғҒ м°ёмЎ°лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” л ҲмҪ”л“ңлҘј м •лҰ¬н•Ё, к·ё мҷём—җлҸ„ нҠёлһңмһӯм…ҳ ID (XID) м •лҰ¬ , н…Ңмқҙлё” нҶөкі„мһ‘м—… л“ұмқ„ мҲҳн–үн•Ё

replication (streaming-replication)

  • Master м—җм„ң мғқм„ұлҗң WAL logлҘј Slave DBлЎң мӢӨмӢңк°„м„ұмңјлЎң м „лӢ¬н•ҳм—¬ м •н•©м„ұмқ„ мқјм№ҳмӢңнӮӨлҠ” replication л°©лІ•

HA with auto failover ( pgpool 2)

  • pgpool лҜёл“ӨмӣЁм–ҙлҘј м•һлӢЁм—җ л‘җм–ҙ load balancing , auto failover кё°лҠҘмқ„ мҲҳн–үн•Ё
